summary: Action Language Standardization - Iteration 278. All 12 features verified: (1) Pipeline page loads after login, (2) Hero action title shows 'Follow up now' (tier-based), (3) Hero CTA button shows 'Follow up now →', (4) School name 'UCLA' prominent above action title, (5) 3 signal bullets with colored dots unchanged, (6) Attention cards use 'Re-engage now', 'Follow up now', 'Maintain momentum', (7) On track cards use 'Maintain momentum', (8) All cards clickable and navigate to school detail, (9) Hero CTA navigates correctly, (10) Pipeline/Priority toggle works, (11) Kanban cards now show 'Follow up now' and 'Reassess approach' instead of 'Review Action' and 'Review Flag'. Fixed KanbanBoard.js getShortAction() to transform passive labels.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineHero.js: Hero action title tier-based mapping (lines 121-128) - 'Follow up now' for high, 'Follow up soon' for medium, 'Maintain momentum' for low - VERIFIED
PipelineHero.js: CTA button label mapping (lines 213-218) - transforms review/check/look to 'Follow up now' - VERIFIED
PriorityBoard.js: Card action label transformation (lines 152-163) - re-engage→'Re-engage now', monitor→'Maintain momentum', follow up→'Follow up now' - VERIFIED
KanbanBoard.js: getShortAction() function (lines 20-33) - FIXED to transform 'Review Action'→'Follow up now' and 'Review Flag'→'Reassess approach'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 12 features verified, 10/10 automated tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Action language standardization complete. All passive labels (Review, Check, Look at) replaced with action-oriented phrases (Follow up now, Reply now, Re-engage now, Maintain momentum, Reassess approach). Fixed KanbanBoard.js getShortAction() function to transform ctaLabel fallback values. Pipeline/Priority toggle works. All cards clickable and navigate correctly.

pipeline_page_loads.details: Pipeline page loads successfully after login with Priority view

hero_action_title_follow_up_now.details: Hero action title shows 'Follow up now' (tier-based: high→'Follow up now', medium→'Follow up soon', low→'Maintain momentum')

hero_cta_button_follow_up_now.details: Hero CTA button shows 'Follow up now →' instead of 'Review Action →'

hero_school_name_prominent.details: School name 'UCLA' displayed prominently above action title

hero_signal_bullets_unchanged.details: 3 signal bullets with colored dots: 'Overdue follow-up needs action', 'Coach responded', 'Momentum is building'

attention_cards_standardized.details: Attention cards show 'Re-engage now', 'Follow up now', 'Maintain momentum' instead of school-specific labels

on_track_cards_maintain_momentum.details: On track cards show 'Maintain momentum' instead of 'Monitor X University'

cards_clickable_navigation.details: All cards clickable and navigate to school detail page /pipeline/{program_id}

hero_cta_navigation.details: Hero CTA navigates correctly to school detail page

kanban_cards_standardized.details: Kanban cards now show 'Follow up now', 'Reply Now', 'Reassess approach' instead of 'Review Action' and 'Review Flag'

fix_applied.issue: Kanban cards were showing 'Review Action' and 'Review Flag' from ctaLabel fallback
fix_applied.fix: Added transformation logic to convert 'Review Action'→'Follow up now' and 'Review Flag'→'Reassess approach' before returning ctaLabel
